queries.question: Show the advertising and subscription types where either are listed for Good Housekeeping magazine.
queries.sql:
SELECT Advertising.Type
FROM Advertising
WHERE Advertising.Magazine = "Good Housekeeping"
UNION
SELECT Subscriptions.Type
FROM Subscriptions
WHERE Subscriptions.Magazine = "Good Housekeeping"

queries.question: Show all the advertising types and also show the subscriptions types but just for Good Housekeeping magazine.
queries.sql:
SELECT Advertising.Type
FROM Advertising
UNION
SELECT Subscriptions.Type
FROM Subscriptions
WHERE Subscriptions.Magazine = "Good Housekeeping"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all types of advertising and subscriptions for Good Housekeeping magazine.
